title: AI + Coding for Smart Students
description: Build thinking ability, confidence, coding fundamentals, AI literacy, and project habits.
goal: Build thinking ability, confidence, coding fundamentals, AI literacy, and project habits.
modules: Problem-solving and logic; Python or Scratch fundamentals; web basics; AI fundamentals; project planning; debugging; presentation.
primaryOutcome: Working game, mini website, AI-assisted project, logic portfolio
overview: Students complete a working game, mini website, or AI-assisted coding project and present it confidently.

title: Build Apps & Websites: Creator Lab
description: Develop builder mindset and practical web development skills.
goal: Develop builder mindset and practical web development skills.
modules: HTML, CSS, JavaScript; responsive design; backend concepts; database fundamentals; forms; deployment; portfolio polish.
primaryOutcome: Live website or web application with deployment
overview: Students publish a live website or web application that can be shown to parents, schools, or portfolio reviewers.

title: AI Tools & Automation for Students
description: Teach students to use AI responsibly for learning, productivity, research, and workflow design.
goal: Teach students to use AI responsibly for learning, productivity, research, and workflow design.
modules: AI usage fundamentals; prompt engineering; study automation; note systems; workflow optimization; productivity dashboards.
primaryOutcome: Personal AI-powered study and productivity system
overview: Students build a personal AI-powered productivity system for study planning, revision, and project management.

title: Cyber Safety & Ethical Hacking
description: Develop digital intelligence, online safety awareness, and responsible cyber habits.
goal: Develop digital intelligence, online safety awareness, and responsible cyber habits.
modules: Online safety; privacy; passwords; phishing; scams; ethical hacking concepts; safe beginner security tools.
primaryOutcome: Cyber awareness portfolio and beginner security tools
overview: Students create a cyber safety portfolio with a checklist, awareness presentation, and small beginner security tools.
